product.name: Aramid D2 260 El
product.categorySourceGroup: Inherent Flame Retardant Denim and Elasthane Aramid Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: Aramid Elasthane Fabric, 88% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon 5% Elastane , 260 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 260 g/m², 88% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon 5% Elastane, Inherent Flame Retardant, Elasthane, Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric Aramid elasthane twill fabric
descriptions: for military application and firefighters with ultra comfort.
Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 certification.
Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2)
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
Aramid Elasthane Fabric, 88% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon 5% Elastane , 260 gr/m'2
260 g/m², 88% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon 5% Elastane, Inherent Flame Retardant, Elasthane, Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric Aramid elasthane twill fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 88% m-Aramid (m-AR) 5% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% Carbon(CF) 5% Elastane (El) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp > 1500N; Weft > 1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>70N ; Weft>60N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612
